/usr/bin/c++ -fsanitize=address -fno-omit-frame-pointer -g -arch arm64 -dynamiclib -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -o libai_sdk.dylib -install_name @rpath/libai_sdk.dylib "CMakeFiles/ai-sdk-c.dir/ai_sdk.cpp.o"  ../../libai-sdk-core.a ../../providers/openai/libai-sdk-openai.a ../../providers/anthropic/libai-sdk-anthropic.a ../../providers/google/libai-sdk-google.a ../../providers/deepseek/libai-sdk-deepseek.a ../../providers/groq/libai-sdk-groq.a ../../providers/xai/libai-sdk-xai.a ../../providers/mistral/libai-sdk-mistral.a ../../providers/fireworks/libai-sdk-fireworks.a ../../providers/togetherai/libai-sdk-togetherai.a ../../providers/perplexity/libai-sdk-perplexity.a ../../providers/cohere/libai-sdk-cohere.a ../../providers/openai/libai-sdk-openai.a ../../libai-sdk-core.a /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_json.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libboost_container.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libssl.dylib /opt/homebrew/lib/libcrypto.dylib
